summary: Stage 33.2.1 Testing Complete - Global Navigation & Sidebar Restoration verified. All 7 features tested and passed. UniversalHeader renders correctly with burger menu, home icon, currency selector, and login button. AppSidebar opens properly and shows role-appropriate navigation for GUEST, ADMIN, and PARTNER users. Admin Dashboard loads correctly with both global navigation header and local admin sidebar. Homepage has no duplicate headers.

passed_tests.test: UniversalHeader renders correctly with burger menu
passed_tests.result: PASS - Burger menu with data-testid='sidebar-trigger' found
PASS - Home icon with teal gradient square visible
PASS - THB currency selector with Thai flag visible

passed_tests.test: UniversalHeader has login button for GUEST
passed_tests.result: PASS - Teal Login button visible for non-authenticated users

passed_tests.test: AppSidebar opens when clicking burger menu
passed_tests.result: PASS - Sheet dialog opens on burger menu click

passed_tests.test: AppSidebar shows correct navigation for GUEST user
passed_tests.result: PASS - Shows My Bookings, Messages, Browse, Home, Login/Register prompt

passed_tests.test: AppSidebar shows correct navigation for ADMIN user
passed_tests.result: PASS - Shows Dashboard, Users, Partner Applications (NEW), Listing Moderation, All Bookings, Messages, Finance Hub (LIVE), System Settings, System Status, Home

passed_tests.test: AppSidebar shows correct navigation for PARTNER user
passed_tests.result: PASS - Shows Dashboard, My Listings, My Bookings, Chat, Earnings, Home

passed_tests.test: Admin Dashboard page loads correctly with sidebar
passed_tests.result: PASS - Admin layout sidebar (dark theme) and UniversalHeader (light theme) both visible and functional
PASS - Single fixed header (UniversalHeader), no admin sidebar on homepage

passed_tests.test: ADMIN header shows Admin/Partner/My Bookings buttons
passed_tests.result: PASS - Role-based quick nav buttons visible in header center for admin users

passed_tests.test: ADMIN sidebar has Switch Panel (Admin/Partner toggle)
passed_tests.result: PASS - Quick panel switch buttons visible in sidebar for admin users

critical_code_review_comments: AppSidebar properly uses shadcn Sheet component with data-testid='sidebar-trigger' for burger menu
Role-based navigation filtering implemented correctly in getNavItems() function
Admin users correctly see both UniversalHeader (global nav) and Admin Layout sidebar (local nav)
Finance Hub correctly shows '3.5% Markup • 0.5% Tolerance' per ARCHITECTURAL_PASSPORT
Messages correctly references 'TG Thread 18 Bridge' per ARCHITECTURAL_PASSPORT
System Settings correctly shows 'TG Bot • Webhooks • Commission' per ARCHITECTURAL_PASSPORT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 33.2.1 Global Navigation & Sidebar Restoration fully verified. UniversalHeader shows in all pages with burger menu, home icon (teal gradient), currency selector, and Login button for guests / user dropdown for authenticated users. AppSidebar uses shadcn Sheet component and shows role-appropriate navigation. Admin pages have TWO sidebars working together: 1) AppSidebar from UniversalHeader (global quick nav), 2) Admin Layout sidebar (dark theme, local navigation). No duplicate headers issue - homepage has single fixed header. Login button in header navigates to '/' but does NOT auto-trigger login dialog (login dialog controlled by separate state on homepage).

architectural_passport_compliance.system_settings: ✅ Shows TG Bot, Webhooks, Commission in admin sidebar
architectural_passport_compliance.finance_hub: ✅ Shows 3.5% Markup, 0.5% Tolerance with LIVE badge
architectural_passport_compliance.admin_moderation: ✅ Partner Applications (PENDING_PARTNER) and Listing Moderation (PENDING) both visible
